# Recrea Construction

> English/Spanish-speaking construction company in the Riviera Maya, Mexico (Playa del Carmen, Tulum, Cancún, Puerto Aventuras, Akumal, Bacalar). 196+ completed projects since 2008. Houses, villas, boutique hotels, commercial buildouts, renovation, permits (including SEMA in Tulum), architecture. Fixed-price bilingual contracts, remote build management for foreign owners, fideicomiso guidance. Contact: WhatsApp +52 984 452 5333, constructionrecrea@gmail.com.

## Key pages
- [Cost Calculator (EN)](https://construction-recrea.com/calculator/): instant build cost estimate for the Riviera Maya
- [Construction Company in Tulum](https://construction-recrea.com/construction-company-tulum/): building in Tulum for foreign owners, SEMA permits
- [Construction Company in Playa del Carmen](https://construction-recrea.com/construction-company-playa-del-carmen/): building in PDC for foreign owners

## Facts
- Construction cost Playa del Carmen 2026: $12,000–$25,000 MXN/m² ($650–$1,400 USD)
- Construction cost Tulum 2026: $14,000–$30,000 MXN/m² (SEMA environmental permit required, $50,000–$150,000 MXN)
- Typical 150 m² house with pool: $150,000–$250,000 USD total
- Payment: milestone-based, never more than 15% upfront; written structural warranty
